subject: a robed humanoid figure with outstretched bloody arms performing a ritual, a massive spectral demon looming behind in ghostly blue-white energy
description: A darkly robed figure stands center-frame in a candlelit ritual space, arms stretched wide with blood dripping from the hands. The figure's posture is ecstatic or anguished — hands open, facing slightly forward. Behind and above, a vast spectral demon entity takes shape in swirling blue-white light, its wings and limbs spread wide across the upper half of the frame. Red candles or torches flicker along the lower foreground. The scene is rendered in deep blacks with crimson and cold blue-white accents, the demon shape dominating the background while the human figure remains the compositional anchor.
foreground: robed humanoid figure with arms outstretched, blood dripping from hands, red candles or torches flanking
background: spectral demon entity rendered in blue-white glowing energy, wings spread, cave-like dark space
emotion: ecstatic or anguished — body arched back, arms wide, mouth open
